assertions: When repository root lacks readable `.zoto/spec-system/config.yml`, the conversational reply echoes verbatim Spec System is not initialised. Run `/z-spec-init` first to create `.zoto/spec-system/config.yml`.
That refusal path skips spawning `zoto-spec-generator` and leaves `{specsDir}` without newly introduced dated subtree directories coordinating subtasks.
cases.expected_output: The command stops immediately because Spec System bootstrap is unavailable, echoes the initialise guidance, and does not propose new dated spec directories.

follow_ups: Priority is preventing replay within the SLA window.
We will accept breaking older clients that omit the rotated secret.
Ship behind a guarded feature flag gated to platform admins.
Approve drafting the phased spec artefacts as discussed.
assertions: Before any `{specsDir}/` subdirectory appears, `/z-spec-create` drives at least three sequential clarifiers for the quoted description path.

The delegated briefing to `zoto-spec-generator` begins with REQUIREMENTS_GATE: satisfied and captured requirement bullets tying back to `/z-spec-create \"Harden webhook signing and replay defenses\"`.

The spawn selects a reasoning-class model slug respecting the preferred `claude-opus-4-7-thinking-xhigh`, then documented fallbacks (`claude-4.6-opus-high-thinking`, `claude-opus-4-6`) whenever earlier slugs lack availability.

After clarified requirements, authoring produces `{specsDir}/[yyyymmdd]-harden-webhook/` with `spec-*` coordination index Markdown and `subtask-NN-*` bodies whose deliverables map to Deliverables Checklists.
Shell coordination runs `pnpm run spec-status-roundtrip -- scaffold`, yielding paired `.status.md` plus `.status.yml` files beside each scaffolded subtask under `status/`.
Structured approval prompting precedes spawning `zoto-spec-judge` for adversarial QA.
Closing narration sets the sprint workflow state label to Ready for Review once judge feedback is surfaced.
cases.expected_output: The command sequences three clarifying exchanges, records them in REQUIREMENTS_GATE text, researches the codebase, drafts dated folders with coordination index plus subtasks, scaffolds status mates, obtains approval prompts, invokes the judge reviewer, then labels the bundle ready.

follow_ups: We only need parquet + registry references in scope for this sprint.
Approve moving forward once the clarified scope is echoed back.
assertions: Immediately after ingestion, narration quotes the gist of `@workspace/docs/feature-brief.md` before issuing at least two focused clarifiers for the anchored-file path.
No dated `{specsDir}/` tree materialises prior to documenting REQUIREMENTS_GATE: satisfied atop the delegated transfer that still forwards the original `@workspace/docs/feature-brief.md` reference.
Exploration narration highlights codebase touchpoints impacting telemetry export before outlining decision forks awaiting confirmation.

Downstream artefacts mirror `{specsDir}/[yyyymmdd]-telemetry-export/` conventions with coordination index Markdown, enumerated subtasks, and paired status siblings produced through the scaffold command.

follow_ups: We lack a canonical product doc so lean on codebase discovery instead.
Primary risk is regressing cold-start latency budgets.
Accept small schema migrations if they unblock safer rollouts.
Green-light the scaffolding plan after acknowledging the surfaced tradeoffs.
Yes, run the reviewer once the artefacts look correct.
assertions: `/z-spec-create` bare usage delivers at least three sequential clarifiers, keeps interrogation prompts one-at-a-time, and may continue toward but need not consume the capped total of ten unless the collaborator explicitly accelerates progression with assumptions recorded.
`{specsDir}/` remains absent until REQUIREMENTS_GATE: satisfied plus gathered bullets gate the delegated `zoto-spec-generator` briefing.
Mid-run guidance highlights architecture decisions awaiting confirmation before drafts lock deliverables.
Approval prompts precede spawning `zoto-spec-judge` and the concluding Ready for Review state.
cases.expected_output: Bare palette entry satisfies the minimum interrogation budget, optionally walks toward the ten-prompt ceiling when scope stays unsettled unless earlier advancement is authored with assumptions, then authoring, scaffolding, approvals, reviewer spawn, and Ready for Review tagging unfold.

follow_ups: Resume after USER_ANSWERS specify retry ceilings, backoff multipliers, and regional pairing expectations.
assertions: If `zoto-spec-generator` activates before Requirement gate artefacts exist, narration terminates with fenced `needs_user_input` Markdown and withholds dated directories underneath `{specsDir}/`.
The subsequent replay forwards USER_ANSWERS tying retry ceilings and backoff multipliers without skipping REQUIREMENTS_GATE: satisfied preamble before writes resume.
Post-resume authoring follows `{specsDir}/[yyyymmdd]-*` layout patterns with coordination Markdown, enumerated subtasks, and paired status siblings via `pnpm run spec-status-roundtrip -- scaffold`.
Final orchestration loops through approval prompting, invokes `zoto-spec-judge`, and marks Ready for Review.
